app.name: claude-lens
app.one_liner: A pace-aware, single-file Bash statusline for Claude Code that shows quota usage relative to time remaining using intuitive directional indicators.

screens.name: Statusline Display
screens.purpose: Show real-time, pace-aware quota utilization and contextual developer metadata in Claude Code’s status bar.
primary_actions: Display used% for active quota windows
Show git branch and diff statistics

rust_commands.name: render_statusline
rust_commands.purpose: Execute the claude-lens.sh script to generate the current statusline output from Claude’s quota JSON.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate claude-lens.sh as ~/.claude/statusline.sh via curl or plugin install
week 1: Render used% and pace delta with color-coded ⇡/⇣ indicators
week 1: Validate jq dependency and JSON parsing of Claude quota input
acceptance_tests: Execution completes in under 15ms with ~2MB memory on Apple Silicon
Output includes git branch name and diff stats like '3f +24 -7'
When quota usage is 15% above sustainable rate, display '⇡15%' in red
When quota usage is 15% below sustainable rate, display '⇣15%' in green
